code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut have_best = false
mut best_val = 0
mut best_abs = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        let a = if v < 0
          -v
        else
          v
        end
        if not have_best or a < best_abs
          best_val = v
          best_abs = a
          have_best = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    let a = if v < 0
      -v
    else
      v
    end
    if not have_best or a < best_abs
      best_val = v
      best_abs = a
      have_best = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("min_abs=#{best_val}")
